description: Return a list of all Configurable Field Sets associated with a Project.

parameters.name: include_lov_entries
parameters.description:
whether or not to include LOV entries in the response
(defaults to true)

parameters.name: types[]
parameters.description: Filter by of configurable field set types

parameters.name: include_default_configurable_field_sets
parameters.description: Flag to include the default values for each type of Configurable Field Set if one has not been created.

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Filter by generic tool id(s). Could be a integer or an array of integer.

schema.description: Generic tool IDs that are associated to the Configurable Field Set

parameters.name: action_plan_type_id
parameters.description: Filter by Action Plan type id.

schema.description: Action Plan type id that is associated to the Configurable Field Set
Inspection type ID that is associated to the Configurable Field Set
Observations category id that is associated to the Configurable Field Set
Category that is associated to the Configurable Field Set

id.description: The unique identifier of the configurable field set.

name.description: The name of the configurable field set.

type.description: The type of configurable field set

category.description: Specifies the category for the configurable field set if it exists or an empty string. This property was added for the ConfigurableFieldSet::Observations::Item class.

class_name.description: Specifies the class the configurable field set is associated with.

fields.description: Specifies the hash of fields on an object. This is for example purposes only.

custom_field_1.description: Custom Field object for an existing custom field in this configurable field set object.

sections.description: An array of sections that are used for custom fields.

inspection_type_id.description: The unique identifier of the inspection type.

generic_tool_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the generic tool.

action_plan_type_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the action plan type.

observations_category_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the observations category.

updated_at.description: The time when the field set was last updated.

updated_by.description: The user who last updated the field set.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user who last updated the field set.

email.description: The email address of the user who last updated the field set.

name.description: The name of the user who last updated the field set.
